zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass於1380年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米時，他的父親Thomas Home35歲，母親Nicole Pepdie38歲。他和Lady Marion Lauder至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1424年8月17日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福維易爾享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass was born in 1380, in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Home, was 35 and his mother, Nicole Pepdie, was 38. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Lady Marion Lauder. He died on 17 August 1424, in Verneuil, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass est né en 1380, à Home, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Home, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Nicole Pepdie, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Marion Lauder. Il est décédé le 17 août 1424, à Verneuil, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass 1380 in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Home 35 und seine Mutter Nicole Pepdie 38. Er hatte mit Lady Marion Lauder mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. August 1424 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Verneuil, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass è nato il nel 1380 nel Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Home, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Nicole Pepdie, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Lady Marion Lauder. Morì il 17 agosto 1424, nel Verneuil, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 홈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Home(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Nicole Pepdie(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Lady Marion Lauder(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 8월 17일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 니e브르 베른우일에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Lady Marion Lauder. Он умер 17 августа 1424 г. в местности вирнеуил, ниeвр, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.
